notes: Two agents (HoopoeCC1, HoopoeCC2) submit conflicting ActionPlans for the same bead (hp-n7u-target) and same file (apps/desktop/src/wizard/StepDeploy.tsx) within the daemon's arbitration window. Per plan.md §8.3.1, the daemon — not the model — is the executor: it accepts the first ActionPlan that satisfies the policy + idempotency + approvals + postcondition gates and rejects the conflicting one with outcome=CONFLICT. The first-arrived plan wins; the second receives a problem envelope referencing the winning plan_id.
